intro: A plain roundup of the week's notable military and business technology (full analysis was unavailable this run).

deep_dives.title: Ukraine Claims Scores Of Russian Ships Struck In Sea Of Azov
deep_dives.what_happened: The long-range drone attacks are targeting Russian oil tankers, adding to that nation's burgeoning war-induced energy woes. The post Ukraine Claims Scores Of Russian Ships Struck In Sea Of Azov appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: LRASM and JASSM Production to Triple Under New US Air Force Contract
deep_dives.what_happened: The U.S. Air Force now anticipates buying more than 11,000 new JASSM and LRASM cruise missiles over the next five to seven years according to a notice of intent published Friday, dramatically expanding the Pentagon’s JASSM and LRASM topline inventory objectives for both weapons that have had their objectives periodically increased over the past decade. ... The post LRASM and JASSM Production to Triple Under New US Air Force Contract appeared first on Naval News .

deep_dives.title: Anti-Drone Warfare at Sea: Matching Sensors and Effectors to the Threat
deep_dives.what_happened: Effective Anti-Drone Warfare demands a complete kill chain – detection, identification, tracking, and hard-kill engagement – with every link matched to the physics and economics of the Tier 2 OWA drone threat. This article examines the technology choices for each link: why only AESA radar meets the detection requirement, what the electro-optic director must deliver, ... The post Anti-Drone Warfare at Sea: Matching Sensors and Effectors to the Threat appeared first on Naval News .

deep_dives.title: Bunker Talk: Let’s Talk About All The Things We Did And Didn’t Cover This Week
deep_dives.what_happened: It's not fear, it's patience. The post Bunker Talk: Let’s Talk About All The Things We Did And Didn’t Cover This Week appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: USAF Decides Against Flying B-21 Raiders With Just One Pilot
deep_dives.what_happened: The Air Force has made a formal decision about how the B-21 will be crewed as it pushes to start fielding the bombers next year. The post USAF Decides Against Flying B-21 Raiders With Just One Pilot appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: Carrier Qualifications Still Happening For A Few Navy Fighter Pilots In Training
deep_dives.what_happened: E-2 pilots and foreign student pilots still need to do carrier qualifications, but huge changes to the naval aviation training landscape are looming. The post Carrier Qualifications Still Happening For A Few Navy Fighter Pilots In Training appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: Air Force pushing contractors to purge Anthropic by Sept. 1: Memo
deep_dives.what_happened: The Pentagon’s new target is to remove Anthropic department-wide by end of September, even as the AI titan is suing the government to overturn it.

deep_dives.title: Ukraine can soon build its own Patriots – but it could take years
deep_dives.what_happened: Ukraine may soon possess a license the U.S. currently extends to only a handful of allies — but it could be years before Patriots protect Ukrainian cities.
